adjectives.c(3) Library Functions Manual adjectives.c(3)

NAME

adjectives.c

SYNOPSIS

Variables


const char * adjectives []
const size_t adjectives_count = sizeof(adjectives) / sizeof(adjectives[0])

Variable Documentation

const char* adjectives[]

Referenced by acds_string_generate().






const
  size_t adjectives_count = sizeof(adjectives) /
  sizeof(adjectives[0])
